title: festuca poa var. aristata
intro: Festuca poa var. aristata, also known as Rocky Mountain grass or aristata blue grama, is a type of perennial grass native to the western United States. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Native American medicine, where it was valued for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory qualities. The health benefits of Festuca poa var. aristata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support immune function. Festuca poa var. aristata can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional herbal remedies to enhance its medicinal properties.
